title: Tax' & Leon's Biome Trader
description: Adds 8 new biome structures with biome themed villagers. They trade biome themed items and offer new armor sets
body:
## Overview:


Biome Trader is a Minecraft mod that adds new structures with biome themed villager traders, to diffrent minecraft biomes. Trade with them to get special armor with different abilities that match the biome.

Update 3.1.0: Added loot table support and Lootr compatibility

**UPDATE 3.0 Patchnotes:**

Replaced the desert, jungle, and plains structures with new buildings
Replaced the desert, jungle, and plains villager textures with brand-new textures

## Structures:

Adds 8 different structures to the desert, jungle, plains, lush cave, mushroom, and warped forest biomes. Includes special ocean and illager traders.
![structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bcfeb8050b8349f182d0fa7e437d67f7e665bbc.png)


### End Villager Trader update:

The End Villager Trader can only be found in his ship, which spawns high in the sky across the End biomes.

**End Villager Trader:**

Buys and sells End-related items.
Sells rockets for Elytra at master level.
Sells a brand-new Shulker Armor set for the player.
![end trader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f22b685de87ab1def6b5526e5111882e827494e1.png)

## Trader:
8 new professions, each featuring its own structure and trader block, with special and unique trades.
![Trader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9488daf3ee66c4f32afaee404d5cb212636c4bbd.png)

## Armor & Item:
10 new armor sets with special effects based on the biome/trader. Also includes creative mode items that spawn the structures, perfect for map makers/builders.
![Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc7f9632bc542b24e43cc59571e0b4f18b3e50a1.png)
